pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where PROJECT_DIR is explicitly defined and created.
Code inspection of setup_task.sh reveals exactly 11 test functions defined across the three test files.
Verifier script logic uses pass_threshold (defaulting to 75) to evaluate the final score (each of the 4 bugs is worth 25 points).
setup_task.sh generates the codebase with exactly these four bugs embedded in the logic. export_result.sh and verifier.py check for the fixes of these four specific bugs.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a fully synthetic sample dataset of GPS traces. The workspace is set up at '/home/ga/PycharmProjects/city_mobility'. The codebase contains 4 specific bugs to be fixed: missing radians conversion in the haversine formula, lack of dataframe sorting before temporal processing, incorrect speed unit conversion (m/s instead of km/h), and an inverted outlier filter logic. Notably, while the metadata claims there are 14 tests in total, the generated test suite only contains 11 tests. Fixing 3 out of 4 bugs will reach the pass threshold of 75 points.
